back_translation: In view of all these things, we make a binding covenant and put it in writing; on the sealed document our leaders, Levites, and priests are signed.
Those who sealed are these: Nehemiah the governor, son of Hacaliah, and Zedekiah.
Maaziah, Bilgai, Shemaiah — these were the priests.
The Levites: Jeshua son of Azaniah, Binnui of the sons of Henadad, Kadmiel,
and their brothers: Shebaniah, Hodiah, Kelita, Pelaiah, Hanan,
The leaders of the people: Parosh, Pahath-moab, Elam, Zattu, Bani,

And the rest of the people — the priests, Levites, gatekeepers, singers, temple servants, and everyone who had separated themselves from the peoples of the lands for the Law of God, with their wives, sons, and daughters who could understand —

joined with their noble brothers, and entered into a curse and an oath to walk in the Law of God, which had been given through Moses, the servant of God, and to keep and do all the commandments, ordinances, and statutes of the LORD our Sovereign-Master.
We will not give our daughters in marriage to the peoples of the land, and we will not take their daughters for our sons.

When the peoples of the land bring merchandise or any grain to sell on the Sabbath day, we will not buy from them on the Sabbath or on a holy day. Every seventh year we will let the land rest and cancel every debt.
We have placed obligations on ourselves to give a third of a shekel each year for the service of the house of our God.

For the bread of the presence, the regular grain offering, the regular burnt offering, the Sabbath offerings, the new-moon offerings, the appointed feasts, the holy things, and the sin offerings to make atonement for Israel, and for all the work of the house of our God.

We have cast lots among the priests, Levites, and people for the wood offering, to bring it to the house of our God according to our families at appointed times year by year, to burn on the altar of the LORD our God, as it is written in the Law.
And to bring the firstfruits of our land and the firstfruits of all fruit of every tree, year by year, to the house of the LORD.

And the firstborn of our sons and our livestock, as written in the Law, and the firstborn of our herds and our flocks, to bring to the house of our God, to the priests who minister in the house of our God.

And the first portion of our dough, our contributions, the fruit of every tree, the new wine, and the oil, we will bring to the priests, to the storerooms of the house of our God; and the tithe of our land to the Levites — for the Levites are the ones who collect the tithes in all the cities where we work.

And a priest, a son of Aaron, will be with the Levites when the Levites collect the tithes; and the Levites will bring a tenth of the tithes to the house of our God, to the storerooms of the treasury.

For the sons of Israel and the sons of Levi will bring contributions of grain, new wine, and oil to the storerooms, where the vessels of the sanctuary are, along with the ministering priests, gatekeepers, and singers. And we will not neglect the house of our God.
